params.StackDescription: REP Reveal_{p:You} reveals & of your_of their & put_{p:You} puts & into your_into their & Then exile_Then {p:You} exiles
params.SpellDescription: Reveal the top three cards of your library. For each of those cards, put that card into your hand unless any opponent pays 3 life. Then exile the rest.
